searches_run.notes: Most hits are CTO-office meeting notes / runbooks (low semantic value). Tier-1 keepers: Moneyfarm V2 - HLD (12216961926), MF additions Deposit Event (13551468545), MoneyFarm global payments configurations (13600227427). Tier-2 keeper: ISA - MoneyFarm For CS TLs (13209534657).

pages.title: Individual Savings Account (ISA) - MoneyFarm (For CS TLs)
pages.relevance_reason: Customer-Service operational guide. Confirms MoneyFarm = ISA (Individual Savings Account) and that the CS team relies on a Tableau report 'ISACustomerLookupDashboard / ISACustomerDashboard' for MoneyFarm External ID lookups. Useful as Tier-2 evidence that an analyst dashboard already exists touching the same MoneyFarm entity space.

pages.title: MoneyFarm - global payments configurations
pages.author: itzikga@etoro.com
pages.relevance_reason: Authoritative dictionary mapping for MoneyFarm: AccountTypeID=4, FundingTypeID=44, PaymentMethodTypeId=44 (mapped to MoneyFarm), DefaultCurrency=5. Connects MoneyFarm to the eToro payments DB joins (Dictionary.AccountTypes, Dictionary.FundingType). Critical for explaining why downstream MIMO/AUM/Fees panels filter on AccountTypeID=4.

pages.title: Moneyfarm V2 - HLD
pages.relevance_reason: Authoritative HLD for the V2 MoneyFarm integration. Defines eligibility criteria (countryID=UK + designatedRegulation=FCA + playerStatus=Normal + ≥1 Approved deposit + non-legacy), redirect URLs, CCM feature flags. Establishes the upstream business contract that explains why bi_output_moneyfarm_customers exists and what populates it.

pages.title: MF additions - Support for Money Farm Deposit Event
pages.relevance_reason: Authoritative HLD describing how MoneyFarm PORTFOLIO_DEPOSIT events flow from Sub-Accounts EventHub through sub-accounts-experience-worker to the payments-metrics Service Bus. This is the data-lineage contract for v_moneyfarm_mimo: it explains the Transaction-ID hash (GCID, valueDate, Amount), the AccountTypeId=4 hardcode, the FTD detection path, and which compliance.bronze_event_hub_prod_event_streaming_we_sub_accounts events are MoneyFarm-relevant.
